SEEL BambooHR subpage links.summary: Use individual BambooHR job pages when an id exists.
SEEL BambooHR subpage links.fix_applied: Canonicalized SEEL apply/source/original URLs to individual BambooHR /careers/{id} pages.
SEEL BambooHR subpage links.parser_source_rule_added: BambooHR adapter builds individual URLs from job.id/jobOpeningId.
SEEL BambooHR subpage links.validation_added: Verification requires SEEL-412 exact subpage URL.

Bullard Center pay and description.summary: Parse hiring range and Job Description Summary / TWC Summary.
Bullard Center pay and description.fix_applied: Set Bullard description from TWC summary and hiring range $80,870.19-$103,109.49.
Bullard Center pay and description.parser_source_rule_added: High-priority description headings include Job Description Summary and TWC Summary; pay parser supports Hiring Range.
Bullard Center pay and description.validation_added: Verification requires Bullard pay and opening description.

Nature Conservancy public URLs.summary: Use careers.tnc.org detail URLs, not Workday apply URLs.
Nature Conservancy public URLs.fix_applied: Converted TNC Workday URLs to careers.tnc.org /us/en/job/{JR}/{slug} URLs and archived Montana Director because the live TNC page says the job is no longer posted.
Nature Conservancy public URLs.parser_source_rule_added: Normalizer canonicalizes Nature Conservancy Workday URLs to public careers.tnc.org URLs.
Nature Conservancy public URLs.validation_added: Verification rejects public Nature Conservancy Workday apply URLs, checks the archived Montana exact URL, and requires Montana not be public.

Hip Hop Caucus percent preservation.summary: Remove orphan think % while preserving Think 100%.
Hip Hop Caucus percent preservation.fix_applied: Replaced orphan think%/think % text with Think 100% in all canonical fields.
Hip Hop Caucus percent preservation.parser_source_rule_added: Description cleaning keeps percent signs and validation searches public/generated text.
Hip Hop Caucus percent preservation.validation_added: Verification rejects think % and requires Think 100% remains.

More Perfect Union hourly pay.summary: Campus Video Editor Fellow base pay should be $25/hr; reimbursement as note.
More Perfect Union hourly pay.fix_applied: Set base pay to $25/hr and moved reimbursement to compensation_note/salary_note.
More Perfect Union hourly pay.parser_source_rule_added: Rippling adapter now uses salary extractor instead of first dollar amount; pay formatter preserves hourly /hr.
More Perfect Union hourly pay.validation_added: Verification requires Campus Video Editor Fellow salary $25/hr.

Renew Home redundant remote formatting.summary: Avoid Remote / Remote or remote role and Remote duplication.
Renew Home redundant remote formatting.fix_applied: Normalized Renew Home remote locations to Remote with a single Remote workplace label.
Renew Home redundant remote formatting.parser_source_rule_added: Frontend/detail formatters collapse duplicate remote tokens.
Renew Home redundant remote formatting.validation_added: Verification rejects Remote / Remote and duplicate remote role text.

GoodPower audit.fix_applied: Confirmed live GoodPower Lifecycle Marketing Manager; set Remote - US and $78,000-$83,000 / year.
GoodPower audit.parser_source_rule_added: Existing pay parser supports Annual salary range from JazzHR/ApplyToJob pages.

Emerald Cities Collaborative removal.summary: Remove/block source because it only posts on Indeed.
Emerald Cities Collaborative removal.fix_applied: Removed pending Emerald Cities entries and disabled/blocked source.
Emerald Cities Collaborative removal.parser_source_rule_added: Blocked-source rules now include Emerald Cities Collaborative.
Emerald Cities Collaborative removal.validation_added: Verification requires no Emerald Cities public or pending records.

RMI zero openings.summary: Remove/archive RMI false jobs and mark zero-openings.
RMI zero openings.fix_applied: Removed RMI pending false positives and marked RMI sources zero_openings.
RMI zero openings.validation_added: Verification requires no RMI public jobs.

Advanced Energy United starting pay.summary: Director Expanding Wholesale Markets pay should parse Starting at $120,000.
Advanced Energy United starting pay.fix_applied: Set Director - Expanding Wholesale Markets pay to $120,000+ / year.
Advanced Energy United starting pay.parser_source_rule_added: Pay parser/formatter supports Salary: Starting at $120,000.

Greentown Labs no-dollar USD ranges.fix_applied: Set Greentown Coordinator pay ranges to $60,000-$68,000 / year.
Greentown Labs no-dollar USD ranges.parser_source_rule_added: Pay parser supports ranges without dollar signs followed by USD per year.

EDF source.summary: Use https://www.edf.org/jobs and remove stale Workday/API public URLs.
EDF source.fix_applied: Archived stale EDF public record, set source to edf.org/jobs, and seeded current EDF jobs to pending from EDF page.
EDF source.validation_added: Verification requires EDF source config exact URL and no stale EDF public Workday/API records.

Oxfam SmartRecruiters public URLs.summary: Use jobs.smartrecruiters.com URLs, not API refs.
Oxfam SmartRecruiters public URLs.fix_applied: Converted all Oxfam SmartRecruiters API URLs to public jobs.smartrecruiters.com URLs.
Oxfam SmartRecruiters public URLs.parser_source_rule_added: SmartRecruiters adapter now builds public jobs.smartrecruiters.com links.
Oxfam SmartRecruiters public URLs.validation_added: Verification rejects api.smartrecruiters.com for Oxfam public/pending URLs.

Climate Action Campaign Trakstar URLs.parser_source_rule_added: Trakstar adapter now emits job page URLs without ?apply=true.
Climate Action Campaign Trakstar URLs.validation_added: Verification requires Trakstar job page URL.

Carbon Direct Salary Range.summary: Staff Engineer salary should parse Salary Range $184,000-$225,000 a year.
Carbon Direct Salary Range.fix_applied: Set Carbon Direct Staff Engineer pay to $184,000-$225,000 / year.
Carbon Direct Salary Range.parser_source_rule_added: Pay parser supports Salary Range headings followed by line-break ranges.
Carbon Direct Salary Range.validation_added: Verification requires Carbon Direct Staff Engineer display range.

HASI expected salary range.summary: Parse Expected salary range of $80,000-$100,000 without bonus/equity.
HASI expected salary range.fix_applied: Set HASI Senior Associate base salary to $80,000-$100,000 / year and kept bonus/equity out of base salary.
HASI expected salary range.parser_source_rule_added: Pay parser supports Expected salary range of ...
HASI expected salary range.validation_added: Verification requires HASI Senior Associate display range.

Workflow scripts.summary: Audit workflows for resources/jobs script paths and freshness cadence.
Workflow scripts.fix_applied: Workflow audit script/report checks script existence, validation gating, admin actions, reports, pruning, and 3-day freshness cadence.
